title: Supreme Court denies relief to Anil Ambani in bank fraud classification case
description: The Supreme Court on Thursday denied relief to industrialist Anil Ambani in a case related to the fraud classification proceedings initiated against him by financial institutions including Bank of Baroda, IDBI Bank and Indian Overseas Bank. The Court declined to entertain the plea filed by Ambani challenging a Bombay High Court order after noting that the matter is pending before a single-judge of the High Court.
